name: oh-my-paper
description: Codex-native academic research skills with four top-level workflows plus evidence-gated helper skills.

interface.longDescription: A local-first Codex skill group for deep research, academic paper writing, strict reviewer simulation, full pipeline orchestration, citation verification, and evidence-gated revision.
defaultPrompt: Start a four-skill academic paper pipeline.
Audit this paper draft like a strict reviewer.
Build a rebuttal plan from reviewer comments.
